headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 8, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees dominated the Texas Rangers, winning 9-2 behind a strong team effort. Ezequiel Duran led the Rangers' offense with a home run and 2 RBIs. In other action, the Washington Nationals secured a 7-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Keibert Ruiz leading the offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. The Cleveland Guardians also secured a win, taking down the Kansas City Royals 8-5 behind Bo Naylor's impressive performance. The Chicago Cubs cruised past the Cincinnati Reds 8-3 behind a strong performance from their pitching staff.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Baltimore Orioles left-handed pitcher Cade Povich, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left elbow inflammation. The Los Angeles Angels have also placed catcher Travis d'Arnaud on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 7, 2026, due to right foot plantar fasciitis. The Kansas City Royals have placed left-handed pitcher Cole Ragans on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 7, 2026, due to left elbow impingement.

The Chicago Cubs have made a roster move, acquiring right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson in a trade.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Rangers 9-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Texas Rangers, winning 9-2 behind a strong team effort. Ezequiel Duran led the Rangers' offense with a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Twins 7-5**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a 7-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Keibert Ruiz leading the offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. Taylor Rogers pitched 1.2 scoreless innings for the Twins, striking out 2 batters.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Royals 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-5 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Bo Naylor leading the charge at the plate. Naylor's impressive performance included 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cubs Cruise Past Reds 8-3**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing an 8-3 victory behind a strong performance from their pitching staff. Michael Conforto led the Reds' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run game.

top_news.title: **Orioles Place Cade Povich on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles left-handed pitcher Cade Povich has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left elbow inflammation. The move is effective immediately.

top_news.title: **Ferguson Joins Cubs Roster**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs have acquired right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson in a trade.
